step.sql: WITH narvik_buildings AS (SELECT ST_SetSRID(ST_Extent(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)), 4326) AS bbox FROM matrikkelenbygning_e58ed5b5abd74bc1a42ff55d569f0cf4.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '1806') SELECT omrade, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT bbox FROM narvik_buildings));

WITH narvik_buildings AS (SELECT ST_SetSRID(ST_Extent(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)), 4326) AS bbox FROM matrikkelenbygning_e58ed5b5abd74bc1a42ff55d569f0cf4.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '1806') SELECT omrade, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT bbox FROM narvik_buildings));

WITH narvik_buildings AS (SELECT ST_SetSRID(ST_Extent(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)), 4326) AS bbox FROM matrikkelenbygning_e58ed5b5abd74bc1a42ff55d569f0cf4.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '1806') SELECT omrade, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT bbox FROM narvik_buildings));
